# This test exercises MMA behavior at low write bandwidth. With 500 ranges
# spread across 6 nodes under a write-only workload, each store converges to
# ~917 KB/s of write bandwidth. Per-range WB contributions are ~3.7 KB/s, so
# individual replica moves cause only small relative changes in store load.
#
# Despite the low absolute throughput, MMA correctly identifies small WB
# imbalances using fractionAbove on raw bytes/s values. Stores slightly above
# the mean are classified as overloadSlow and shed replicas, while stores below
# the mean absorb them. Because per-range WB is small relative to the mean,
# moves produce modest improvements per transfer.
#
# In mma-only mode, WB thrashing is moderate (~103%) as MMA makes small
# adjustments that don't fully resolve imbalances in a single move. In
# mma-count mode, replica count balancing adds additional churn as it shuffles
# ranges to equalize counts, amplifying WB thrashing (~250%).
#
# See: https://github.com/cockroachdb/cockroach/issues/164539
#
# Setup:
#   - 6 nodes, 500 ranges with skewed initial placement
#   - Write-only uniform workload, so after convergence all stores cluster near
#     the balanced WB ≈ 917 KB/s
#   - Per-range WB ≈ 3.7 KB/s
gen_cluster nodes=6 node_cpu_cores=8
----

gen_ranges ranges=500 placement_type=skewed
----

gen_load rate=1835 rw_ratio=0 min_block=1000 max_block=1000 raft_cpu_per_write=1
----
0.00 raft-vcpus, 1.7 MiB/s goodput

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

eval duration=25m cfgs=(mma-only,mma-count) metrics=(write_bytes_per_second,replicas,cpu)
----
mma-only:
cpu#1: last:  [s1=973, s2=998, s3=935, s4=898, s5=862, s6=829] (stddev=59.36, mean=915.83, sum=5495)
cpu#1: thrash_pct: [s1=18%, s2=16%, s3=26%, s4=16%, s5=15%, s6=15%]  (sum=108%)
replicas#1: first: [s1=500, s2=433, s3=243, s4=148, s5=100, s6=76] (stddev=162.90, mean=250.00, sum=1500)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=266, s2=273, s3=255, s4=245, s5=235, s6=226] (stddev=16.51, mean=250.00, sum=1500)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
write_bytes_per_second#1: last:  [s1=973211, s2=998143, s3=935506, s4=898278, s5=862148, s6=829092] (stddev=59397.16, mean=916063.00, sum=5496378)
write_bytes_per_second#1: thrash_pct: [s1=12%, s2=16%, s3=25%, s4=18%, s5=15%, s6=15%]  (sum=102%)
hash: e615c98de3bd44e0
==========================
mma-count:
cpu#1: last:  [s1=952, s2=952, s3=950, s4=880, s5=880, s6=884] (stddev=35.03, mean=916.33, sum=5498)

replicas#1: first: [s1=500, s2=433, s3=243, s4=148, s5=100, s6=76] (stddev=162.90, mean=250.00, sum=1500)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=260, s2=260, s3=259, s4=240, s5=240, s6=241] (stddev=9.68, mean=250.00, sum=1500)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=3%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=3%)

write_bytes_per_second#1: thrash_pct: [s1=56%, s2=59%, s3=42%, s4=35%, s5=33%, s6=28%]  (sum=253%)
hash: 18c684e515fd035f
==========================
